data.title: 国际服「2022 Korea Game Awards」礼物
data.summary: [2022 Korea Game Awards Celebratory Gift] Thanks to the love and support from Senseis, Blue Archive
data.body:
[2022 Korea Game Awards Celebratory Gift]

Thanks to the love and support from Senseis, Blue Archive has won a total of 3 awards- Most Popular, Technical Innovation(Character), and Outstanding Developer Awards!🎉

Please check your mailbox for our Thank you gift!💙

#BlueArchive
![iyJ6VfnavPQjiQyusLzTuN5qvQW5J5HL.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/iyJ6VfnavPQjiQyusLzTuN5qvQW5J5HL.jpg)
